message:
fix(ci): strip UNC prefix in find tool + increase stack budget for macOS

- strip_unc_prefix now handles both \\?\ and //?/ (fd uses forward slashes)
- Find tool strips UNC prefix from search_path and fd output lines so
  relativization works correctly on Windows
- Increase stack limit from 256KB to 512KB in security_budgets tests
  (bridge JS init now needs >256KB on macOS ARM64 after code growth)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
